props.ChoiceText: You rode hard with sealed orders you were not meant to read and learned how military power travels by speed, fear, and trust.
props.ChoiceBio: Riding with sealed orders taught you how much command depends on messages carried by those beneath it.

0.TransitionText: Because riding with sealed words and frightened faces taught you how much power can travel without speaking aloud, you were drawn deeper into intimate household service.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because riding with sealed words and frightened faces taught you how much power can travel without speaking aloud, handling dangerous business without failing made greater command conceivable.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because riding with sealed words and frightened faces taught you how much power can travel without speaking aloud, you drifted toward the world of favor, secrecy, and courtly intrigue.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.
